description.value: The creature is a sanctioned psyker, having undergone the Soul Binding or other sanctioning process. It gains a +10 bonus to resist the effects of Psychic Phenomena and Perils of the Warp, but may have suffered physical or mental side effects from the process.

system.benefit: The psyker has been sanctioned, gaining +10 to resist Psychic Phenomena and Perils of the Warp.
